title: prunella × fontqueri
intro: Prunella × fontqueri, also known as the hybrid of Prunella vulgaris, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Herbal preparations of Prunella × fontqueri can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
